content: We can reframe autonomous agent goal exploration as a continuous streaming ICM (Intensive Care Medicine) training problem, where every new environmental interaction the agent makes acts as a real-time streaming clinical experience for the agent’s own intrinsic curiosity module (ICM) to process. This lets the agent continuously update its world model and revalidate its exploration priorities the same way intensivists refresh their clinical competencies through ongoing streamed educational experiences.
source_topics: Streaming experience processing for ICM training
trigger_topic: Streaming experience processing for ICM training
